UG-40  LIMITS OF REINFORCEMENT. (a) The limits of reinforcement, measured parallel to the vessel wall, shall extend a distance equal to the greater of the nozzle opening diameter d or Rts + Rntn on each side of the opening centerline. (b) The limit measured normal to the vessel wall (through the nozzle) shall extend to the smaller of 2.5T or 2.5Tn plus any pad thickness. (c) These limits define the zone within which the reinforcement area of UG-37 and UG-38 shall be calculated. Nozzle wall thickness shall be as required by UG-44. For nozzle dimensions, see UG-45. Weld attachment details shall comply with UW-16, unless exempted by UW-15 for certain joint configurations.
